prompt: Assess lifecycle state, percent complete, defects, and remaining work.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is B-301 Standard work execution within 2.10 Assembly & Fabrication. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.3 Line Operations. The observed field condition is: skipped verification step under takt pressure (TRD). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors site standard work, TWI. Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: T5 B-301 Progress assessment
